---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for Council OS SDKs
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Which SDK / Package

(e.g., `@council/sdk`, `council-sdk`, `@council/connector-sdk`)

## Use Case

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the scenario.

## Proposed Solution

How would you like this to work? Include API examples if possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
